headline: US clears Paramount's $111 bn Warner Bros. takeover
summary: The US Justice Department on Friday cleared Paramount Skydance's $111 billion takeover of Warner Bros.A group of Democratic senators led by Elizabeth Warren had warned that a Warner Bros. deal risked being "tainted by political favoritism and corruption," urging the Justice Department to review it on the law and facts.
